title: [TASK] Set up PostgreSQL in Docker with automated migration/change script mechanism

conversation_log.summary: Task is architecturally sound with three required adjustments: (1) Docker Compose file location must reference `docker/docker-compose.yml` per ADR-004, not monorepo root; (2) migration package path `packages/database/` is acceptable but must use `@cv-tool/database` as the package name per ADR-002; (3) recommend plain SQL migration tool (e.g. dbmate) over Node-based ORM tooling to keep the database package free of runtime dependencies, but any tool is acceptable if documented in tech-decisions.md.
